svg.desc: input — grey rounded rect; produces values into the topology relay — teal pill; passes value through, no logic join — magenta rounded rect; AND gate, fires when both inputs arrive readgate — magenta rounded rect; gates on ready signal chaininhibitor — orange rounded rect; dual output: out + inhibitOut (lockstep fan-out) inhibitrightgate — magenta rounded rect; fires on L-alone, drains silent on R GREEN zone — COVERED test scenario (A1–A4) ORANGE zone — MISSING test scenario (A5, A6-A8, B1, B2, C2, D1-D3, E1, F1) MAGENTA zone — HEADLINE missing scenario (C1 lateral cascade)
svg.text: Integration Test Plan — System Coverage Map

g.text: AND gate — waits for both inputs (magenta)
